messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":{"age":25,"gender":"woman","sexual_orientation":"homosexual","occupation":"not applicable","city_of_living":"Kansas City","employment_status":"unemployed","education_level":"vocational diploma","parents_education":{"parent_1":"lower secondary","parent_2":"primary school"},"current_marital_status":"single","children":0,"migration_status":"native-born American","psychological_feature":"with good mental health","religious_beliefs":"Hinduism","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend a few times monthly on social media","hobbies":["running","reading novels","birdwatching"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":6,"level":"low"},"conscientiousness":{"score":8,"level":"low"},"extraversion":{"score":49,"level":"moderate"},"agreeableness":{"score":87,"level":"high"},"neuroticism":{"score":37,"level":"moderate"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "Creating a personalized content detection system using AI to identify and flag fake news and misinformation on social media platforms. By leveraging natural language processing (NLP) techniques, machine learning algorithms can analyze text, images, and videos shared on social media to determine their accuracy and authenticity. Additionally, users can report suspicious content directly from the platform without needing to leave it, and social media companies can take action against fake accounts and content. Through this approach, individuals can stay informed and safe online while still enjoying the benefits of social media platforms."
,"reasoning_summary": "Based on the persona's background and traits, creating a personalized content detection system using AI to identify and flag fake news and misinformation on social media is the best approach for managing and dealing with fake content. The system can analyze text, images, and videos shared on social media to determine their accuracy and authenticity, providing users with an additional layer of protection against false information. Additionally, the ability to report suspicious content directly from the platform without needing to leave it adds convenience and efficiency to the process. By implementing this approach, individuals can stay informed and safe online while still enjoying the benefits of social media platforms."
,"tone": "informative",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: Creating a personalized content detection system using AI to identify and flag fake news and misinformation on social media platforms. By leveraging natural language processing (NLP) techniques, machine learning algorithms can analyze text, images, and videos shared on social media to determine their accuracy and authenticity. Additionally, users can report suspicious content directly from the platform without needing to leave it, and social media companies can take action against fake accounts and content. Through this approach, individuals can stay informed and safe online while still enjoying the benefits of social media platforms.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Based on the persona's background and traits, creating a personalized content detection system using AI to identify and flag fake news and misinformation on social media is the best approach for managing and dealing with fake content. The system can analyze text, images, and videos shared on social media to determine their accuracy and authenticity, providing users with an additional layer of protection against false information. Additionally, the ability to report suspicious content directly from the platform without needing to leave it adds convenience and efficiency to the process. By implementing this approach, individuals can stay informed and safe online while still enjoying the benefits of social media platforms.
